description:
Overview:

【Multi-compatible】The 3-in-1 portable espresso machine is equipped with a ground coffee compartment and a capsule compartment, which is compatible with small and large capsules and ground coffee.
【Portable and Convenient】The portable espresso machine is suitable for many occasions, convenient and easy to carry, and can be brewed directly.
【Intelligent Extraction】Portable espresso machine adopts an intelligent heating function,and  convenient extraction, double-click the power switch, and open the heating extraction function, heating extraction. Long press the power switch, and directly open the extraction function, convenient operation, suitable for all kinds of hot/cold drinking water.
【Convenient Charging】Portable espresso machine can be charged on the go, portable charging, equipped with Type-C USB cable charging methods, support charging while using, suitable for traveling, camping, driving, home and office.
【Easy to Rinse Good to Disassemble】The portable espresso machine is designed with several parts separated, easy to clean.
【Package Include】Coffee machine mainframe+colour box package+USB cable+Manual


Product information:
Color: white, gray, green, silver, black
Product Name: Portable Italian coffee machine
Product Capacity: 60ml
Battery capacity: 2500mAh/18650*3
Rated Power: 72W
Charging time: about 3 to 4 hours
Product Size: 83.5 × 245.5 × 83.5mm
Rated Voltage: 12V
Current: 4-6A


Packing list:
Host x 1 Charging cable x 1 Instruction manual x 1
